name: Couch Potato Tee
headline: A dog person's honest self-portrait
blurb: For the homebody who's found their perfect companion on the couch and has zero plans to leave.
story: We get it. Your dog is the best listener, the warmest blanket buddy, and the only accountability partner you need. This design celebrates the beautiful introvert life where staying in with your pup is not a compromise, it's the dream. Couch time is quality time.
recraft_prompt: A chunky retro vector illustration of a person and their dog lounging together on a couch, both looking blissfully content, wearing cozy socks, surrounded by snacks and a remote control. Flat bold shapes in warm earthy tones. Text reads 'COUCH POTATO' in blocky sans-serif lettering above or below the scene. Centered, isolated on a plain white background, print-ready apparel graphic.

social.tt_hook: if you spend more time on the couch than anywhere else, this is your tee 🛋️
social.pin_title: Couch Potato Dog Lover T-Shirt - Funny Dog Mom Tee
social.pin_keywords: dog mom shirt, funny dog tee, couch potato, dog lover apparel, introvert dog shirt
social.audience: introverts and homebodies who choose their dog over plans
